image:image.image:title: Flyto2 community growth for open-source AI workflow automation
image:image.image:caption: Open-source AI workflow automation community growth: Flyto2 turns docs, issues, recipes, MCP examples, package pages, and reviewed social posts into one loop.

image:image.image:title: AI Workflow Automation Alternatives: n8n, Zapier, Make, Playwright, LangGraph, and Flyto2
image:image.image:caption: AI workflow automation alternatives compared: n8n, Zapier, Make, Playwright, LangGraph, and Flyto2 for agent and browser automation.

image:image.image:title: AI Search Visibility for Technical Products: llms.txt, Crawler Logs, and Citation Paths
image:image.image:caption: Guide to AI search visibility for technical products: structure pages, llms.txt, crawler logs, and citation paths without unsupported SEO claims.

image:image.image:title: Zero-Person Company Agents: How to Automate Operations Without Losing Control
image:image.image:caption: Guide to zero-person company agents: automate operations with human policy, approval gates, scoped credentials, evidence, and replay.

image:image.image:title: Data Workflow Automation: From Scraping and Files to Clean, Auditable Pipelines
image:image.image:caption: A practical guide to data workflow automation for teams that need browser extraction, file processing, validation, evidence, and repeatable data pipelines.

image:image.image:title: Intelligence Workflow Automation: Turning OSINT, Logs, and Signals Into Decisions
image:image.image:caption: Guide to intelligence workflow automation: collect OSINT, logs, threat feeds, and business signals, then correlate, score, and route with evidence.

image:image.image:title: AI Security Platform Guide: MCP, Agents, Code, and Exposure Risk
image:image.image:caption: How to evaluate an AI security platform for MCP servers, agent tools, code risk, APIs, cloud posture, attack surface, and evidence-backed validation.

image:image.image:title: Bitsight Alternatives: How to Use External Ratings Inside CTEM
image:image.image:caption: Practical guide to Bitsight alternatives: use external ratings inside CTEM while keeping ASM, code risk, dark web, pentest, and red-team evidence.

image:image.image:title: AI Browser Automation: How It Works and When to Use It
image:image.image:caption: A practical guide to AI browser automation: how LLM-driven and deterministic browser automation work, where each wins, common pitfalls, and a getting-started checklist.

image:image.image:title: API Security Testing: A Practical How-To Guide
image:image.image:caption: A practical how-to guide to API security testing: the OWASP API Top 10, finding shadow and zombie APIs, a step-by-step testing approach, and a hardening checklist.

image:image.image:title: Asset Inventory Is the Foundation of Security Scoring
image:image.image:caption: Practical asset inventory security guide: deterministic discovery, ownership gating, BYO CMDB imports, asset maps, and reliable security scoring.

image:image.image:title: Attack Path Mapping: From Exposure to Critical Asset
image:image.image:caption: A practical guide to attack path mapping: how attackers chain exposures into a route to your crown jewels, why isolated CVEs mislead, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and a checklist.

image:image.image:title: Attack Surface Management: A Practical Guide for 2026
image:image.image:caption: A practical guide to attack surface management in 2026: external discovery, CTEM, shadow IT, and how a war room correlates exposure with code.

image:image.image:title: The BYO MSSP: Why You Shouldn't Re-Buy Security Tools You Already Own
image:image.image:caption: BYO MSSP integration model: keep existing tools, ingest external data, fill gaps, and correlate attack-surface, pentest, and red-team evidence.

image:image.image:title: Container and Cloud Identity Security in One Picture
image:image.image:caption: Container and cloud identity security guide: correlate image CVEs, runtime events, over-privileged roles, exposed credentials, code, and external exposure.

image:image.image:title: Container Image Scanning: Secure Your Build Pipeline
image:image.image:caption: Container image scanning explained — how it works, scanning for vulnerabilities, secrets, and misconfigurations, shifting left in CI/CD, signing, and a practical checklist.

image:image.image:title: CVE Prioritization with EPSS and KEV: A Practical Guide
image:image.image:caption: Practical CVE prioritization guide with EPSS and KEV: combine severity, exploit probability, known exploitation, triage workflow, and patch priority.

image:image.image:title: Darkweb Monitoring Explained: Leaked Credentials, IOCs, and Brand Abuse
image:image.image:caption: Darkweb monitoring guide: leaked credentials, IOC lookup, ransomware tracking, threat actors, brand impersonation, BYO feeds, and correlation.

image:image.image:title: DMARC, SPF & DKIM: Email Authentication Setup Guide
image:image.image:caption: A step-by-step DMARC SPF DKIM setup guide: how the three records stop email spoofing, the DNS entries to publish, a safe p=none to p=reject rollout, and a verification checklist.

image:image.image:title: Email Parsing Automation: Extract Data from Inboxes
image:image.image:caption: Email parsing automation extracts structured data from incoming emails like orders, receipts, and leads. Learn how it works, the rules, and pitfalls.

image:image.image:title: Footprint & Attribution: Mapping Assets to Owners Without Guessing
image:image.image:caption: Digital footprint attribution guide: expand OSINT seeds into assets, apply ownership gating, score confidence, and keep security scoring trustworthy.

image:image.image:title: Headless Browser Automation: A Practical Guide
image:image.image:caption: A practical guide to headless browser automation: what it is, how it works, use cases, headless vs headed, anti-bot pitfalls, and a setup checklist.

image:image.image:title: How to Choose an MSSP: A Practical Buyer's Guide
image:image.image:caption: How to choose an MSSP: compare MSSP vs MDR vs in-house, evaluate coverage, SLAs, tooling, BYO support, transparency, red flags, and scoring.

image:image.image:title: Leaked Credential Scanning and Secrets Scanning: A How-To Guide
image:image.image:caption: Leaked credential scanning guide: find exposed secrets in repos, pastes, logs, and darkweb data, then rotate keys and verify remediation.

image:image.image:title: MCP Security: Risks and Controls for AI Tool Servers
image:image.image:caption: MCP security guide: inventory tool servers, reduce unauthenticated execution, bind exposure, and authorization risk, then simulate policy before enforcement.

image:image.image:title: No-Code API Integration: Connect Apps Without Code
image:image.image:caption: A practical no-code API integration guide: connect REST APIs, handle auth (keys/OAuth), pagination, and field mapping without writing code — plus a build checklist.

image:image.image:title: PDF Data Extraction Automation: Tables, Text & Forms
image:image.image:caption: A practical guide to PDF data extraction automation — pull tables, invoices, and form fields reliably, choose OCR vs native text, validate output, and ship it.

image:image.image:title: Pentest as a Service: Recipe-Driven, Evidence-Backed Penetration Testing
image:image.image:caption: Pentest as a service guide: use deterministic YAML recipes, evidence, replay, asset-map targets, and verified-path-only reporting.

image:image.image:title: Pentest vs Vulnerability Scan vs Red Team: Key Differences
image:image.image:caption: Pentest vs vulnerability scan vs red team explained: depth, cost, cadence, the question each answers, when to use which, and how to layer all three in one closed loop.

image:image.image:title: Price Monitoring Automation: Track Prices Automatically
image:image.image:caption: A practical guide to price monitoring automation — track prices across sites, set threshold alerts, log price history, and handle dynamic pages, with a setup checklist.

image:image.image:title: Red-Team Simulation: From Attack Paths to Validated Risk
image:image.image:caption: Red-team simulation guide: use pentest evidence and mapped attack paths to run adversary campaigns and feed validated risk into security scoring.

image:image.image:title: Report Generation Automation: From Data to Document
image:image.image:caption: A practical guide to report generation automation: pull data, template it, render to PDF or slides, schedule, distribute, and keep it reliable over time.

image:image.image:title: SAST vs DAST: Application Security Testing Compared
image:image.image:caption: SAST vs DAST explained: how static and dynamic application security testing work, their strengths and blind spots, where each fits the SDLC, plus IAST and SCA.

image:image.image:title: Scheduled Web Scraping: Automate Recurring Data Pulls
image:image.image:caption: A practical guide to scheduled web scraping: cron-based recurring pulls, change detection, dedup, storage, retries, and an ethics/robots checklist.

image:image.image:title: Shadow IT Discovery: Find and Manage Unsanctioned Assets
image:image.image:caption: Shadow IT discovery guide: find unsanctioned SaaS, DNS, certificate transparency, cloud, and SSO assets, triage risk, and govern exposure.

image:image.image:title: Subdomain Takeover: How It Works and How to Prevent It
image:image.image:caption: Subdomain takeover explained — how dangling DNS records and deprovisioned services let attackers hijack your subdomains, how to detect them, and a prevention checklist.

image:image.image:title: Unified Security Scoring: One Number Across Nine Surfaces
image:image.image:caption: Unified security scoring guide: compute a 250-900 score across code, attack surface, diligence vectors, modifiers, grade caps, and evidence.

image:image.image:title: What Is a vCISO? Virtual CISO Roles, Costs, and Fit
image:image.image:caption: What is a vCISO? A practical guide to the virtual CISO role, responsibilities, engagement models and cost drivers, plus how a vCISO compares to a full-time CISO and an MSSP.

image:image.image:title: What Is an SBOM? Software Supply Chain Security Guide
image:image.image:caption: What is an SBOM? Learn how a Software Bill of Materials works, SPDX vs CycloneDX formats, CVE matching, generation steps, and a practical supply chain checklist.

image:image.image:title: What Is CSPM? Cloud Security Posture Management Guide
image:image.image:caption: What is CSPM? A practical guide to cloud security posture management — the misconfigurations it catches, CSPM vs CWPP vs CNAPP, and a posture-hardening checklist you can run.

image:image.image:title: What Is CTEM? Continuous Threat Exposure Management Guide
image:image.image:caption: What is CTEM? A practical guide to Continuous Threat Exposure Management — the 5 Gartner stages, how it differs from vulnerability management, and a rollout checklist.

image:image.image:title: What Is EASM? External Attack Surface Management Explained
image:image.image:caption: External attack surface management (EASM) explained — continuous discovery of internet-facing assets, shadow IT, certificates and exposed services, and how EASM feeds CTEM.

image:image.image:title: Auto Fill Forms — How to Automate Form Filling on Any Website
image:image.image:caption: Tired of filling out the same web forms? Learn how to auto fill forms on any website using automation. Works with any form, no browser extension needed.

image:image.image:title: Automa Alternative — When a Browser Extension Isn't Enough
image:image.image:caption: Looking for an Automa alternative? Flyto2 goes beyond browser extensions with 451 modules, file operations, AI agents, and cloud automation.

image:image.image:title: Desktop Automation — How to Automate Tasks on Your Own Computer
image:image.image:caption: Learn what desktop automation is and how to automate repetitive tasks on your computer. Practical guide with real examples using Flyto2.

image:image.image:title: Make.com Alternative — Automate Without the Cloud Dependency
image:image.image:caption: Looking for a Make.com alternative? Flyto2 runs locally, handles browser automation, and costs nothing. See how they compare.

image:image.image:title: No Code Automation — Build Workflows Without Writing a Single Line
image:image.image:caption: No code automation lets anyone automate repetitive tasks without programming. Learn how to build real workflows using AI and pre-built modules.

image:image.image:title: Free RPA — Robotic Process Automation Without the Enterprise Price Tag
image:image.image:caption: Free RPA without enterprise pricing: Flyto2 is an open-source RPA tool with 451 modules, browser automation, and zero licensing fees.

image:image.image:title: Workflow Automation — How to Chain Tasks Into One-Click Processes
image:image.image:caption: Workflow automation connects multiple tasks into a single process that runs itself. Learn how to build practical workflows with real examples.

image:image.image:title: Free Zapier Alternative That Actually Runs on Your Computer
image:image.image:caption: Free Zapier alternative for teams avoiding monthly limits and cloud lock-in: Flyto2 automates workflows locally with 451 modules and zero subscription fees.

image:image.image:title: How to Automate Clicking on a Website — A Step-by-Step Guide
image:image.image:caption: Learn how to automate clicking on a website to eliminate repetitive tasks. Simple guide with real examples and no coding required.

image:image.image:title: How to Automate Website Tasks — A Complete Guide for 2026
image:image.image:caption: Learn how to automate website tasks like form filling, data extraction, and report downloads. Three approaches compared with step-by-step examples.

image:image.image:title: Batch Automation: How to Process Hundreds of Tasks at Once
image:image.image:caption: Learn how batch automation can save hours of repetitive work. Process hundreds of files, forms, or data entries in one go with Flyto2.

image:image.image:title: Computer Automation for Beginners: A Practical Guide
image:image.image:caption: New to computer automation? This beginner's guide explains what it is, how it works, and how to automate your first task in minutes with Flyto2.

image:image.image:title: Data Entry Automation — How to Stop Wasting Hours on Manual Data Entry
image:image.image:caption: Data entry automation eliminates repetitive typing and copying. Learn how to automate data entry across websites and forms with no code.

image:image.image:title: A Simpler Automation Anywhere Alternative for Small Teams
image:image.image:caption: Need an automation anywhere alternative that's free and easy? Flyto2 gives small teams 451 modules, no licensing fees, and no enterprise complexity.

image:image.image:title: Free Power Automate Alternative That Just Works
image:image.image:caption: Looking for a power automate alternative free of Microsoft accounts? Flyto2 needs no Microsoft ecosystem, and automates workflows for free.

image:image.image:title: n8n Alternative — When You Need Browser Automation, Not Just API Connections
image:image.image:caption: Looking for an n8n alternative? Flyto2 adds browser automation, cloud execution, and AI agents to your workflow toolkit. See a full comparison.

image:image.image:title: No Code Browser Automation — How Anyone Can Automate Browser Tasks
image:image.image:caption: Discover how no code browser automation lets anyone automate repetitive browser tasks without programming. Practical guide with examples.

image:image.image:title: Record and Replay — The Easiest Way to Automate Your Browser
image:image.image:caption: Record and replay is the simplest way to automate browser tasks. Learn how to record your actions once and replay them anytime.

image:image.image:title: Selenium Alternative — Automate Browsers Without the Pain
image:image.image:caption: Tired of brittle Selenium tests? Compare Selenium vs Playwright vs Flyto2 and find a selenium alternative that fits your automation needs.

image:image.image:title: Web Scraping Tool — How to Collect Data from Any Website Without Code
image:image.image:caption: Learn how to use a web scraping tool to collect data from websites without writing code. Step-by-step guide with practical examples.

image:image.image:title: AI Automation Modules, Not Magic Prompts
image:image.image:caption: Why Flyto2 uses 451 AI automation modules instead of letting agents write code from scratch: deterministic workflows you can debug and replay.

image:image.image:title: Template: Exchange Rate Alert — Monitor Currency Rates with Telegram, Discord & Slack
image:image.image:caption: Use the Exchange Rate Alert community template to fetch live currency rates from a free API and notify Telegram, Discord, Slack, or LINE.

image:image.image:title: Code Intelligence with flyto-indexer
image:image.image:caption: Code intelligence with flyto-indexer gives AI agents and security teams impact analysis, references, dependency maps, dead-code detection, taint analysis, and health scoring.

image:image.image:title: Introducing Flyto2: Evidence-Backed CTEM and Security Automation
image:image.image:caption: Meet Flyto2 evidence-backed CTEM: a security war room and deterministic execution platform for attack surface, code risk, dark web, pentest, and red-team workflows.

image:image.image:title: MCP Server Automation with Flyto2
image:image.image:caption: A practical MCP server automation guide for connecting flyto-core to Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other AI clients with secure tool-surface control.
